titleStmt.title: SII 20.158: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 158. (B.K. No. 41 of 1936-37.) KAḌALĒVĀḌ, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the temple of Śivaliṅga.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1097, Manmatha, Pushya, ba. Amāvāsyā, Tuesday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, corresponding to A.D. 1176, January 13, Tuesday. The saṁkrānti did not, however, occur on that day.

The inscription states that Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Siṁgidēvarasa of Eḷamēlu, belonging to the Silāhāra family, Kasapayya-nāyaka, Mahāpradhāna, Daṇḍanāyaka Kumāra Bammidēvarasa, śrīkaraṇa Chākaṇayya-nāyaka, the mahāprabhu of Kummasi, Guṇḍarasa and his brother Mahādēvarasa made a gift of land and certain taxes for the worship and offerings to the temple of Svayambhū Sōmanātha. The gift was entrusted to āchārya Sōvarāśidēva. The king is stated to have been ruling from Maṁgaḷivēḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī Ōṁ nama śivāya(ḥ) . namastuṁgaśirastuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . trai
ḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . © svasti samastabhuvanāśra
yaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ kāḷāṁjarapu
ravarādhīśvaraṁ suvar(ṁ)nnavriṣabhadhvajaṁ vimaḷakīrttidhvajaṁ ḍamarugatūryyani
rgghōśaṇaṁ samaravibhīśaṇaṁ kaḷacuryyakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍa kada
napracaṁḍa mānakanakācaḷaṁ vairikāḷānaḷaṁ caladaṁkarāmaṁ parākramabhīmaṁ śara
ṇāgatavajrapaṁjaraṁ vairidikkuṁjaraṁ kaligaḷaṁkkusaṁ śrīmatu kaḷacuryya ca
kravartti rāyamurāri bhujabaḷamalla sōvidēvara vijayarājyamuttarōtta
rābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ maṁgaḷivēḍada nelevīḍino
ḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinō(va)dadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti sama
dhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ tagaranarādhīśvaraṁ jīmū
tavāhanānvayaprasūta sauryyaraghujāta rājamāṁdhāta
śrī siḷāṟavaṁśōdbhavaṁ vibhavāmarēṁdra ḍaṁgārabhērīnirghghōṣaṇa sa
maravibhīṣaṇaṁ vidagdhamugdhāṁganāhṛdeyakusmakōdaṁḍa kadanapra
caṁḍa ce(ṁ)nnama(ṁ)nneyapaṁnegavainatēya virōdhimaṁneyatāra
kāsurakārtikēyanativiśamahayārūḍhaprauḍharēkhārēvaṁta vijayala
kṣmīkānta suvarnnagaruḍadhvajaṁ vimaḷakīrtidhvajaṁ kātyāyanīdēvī
labudhavara prasādaṁ sahajamrigaA space
madāmōda sauryyamaṁ meṟeva baṁṭara bāva
maṟeUge kāva sōmanaṁkakāṟa raṇaraṁganīṟa nijada beḍaṁga
śrīmaduttarēsvaradēvara divyaśrīpādārādhakaṁ parabaḷasādhakaṁ nāmā
disamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ siṁgidēvarasaru
cōḷana kaiyānisi nirmmūḷisi vananidhiparītabhūtaḷadari
bhūpāranaḷavaḍisidarārppēḷadaṭargguṇḍarājadaṁḍēśana
volu . vritta . stiranē mērugirīṁdradoḷ seṇasuvaṁ gaṁbhīranē vārddhi
yoḷu puruḍirppaṁ kaliyē madēbharipuvaṁ sīḻdikkuvaṁ dāniyē sura
rggīvaggada kāmadhēnuvinoḷaṁ kūḍi kuḍuvaṁ tānenalu doreyārppā
saṭiyārddharāvaḷeyadoḻu śrīguṁḍadaṁḍapanoḻu . tanagayyaṁ guṁ
ḍadaṁḍādhipanakhiḻamahīkāṁtanā vikramāṁkaṁganituṁ bāha
ttarakkōrvvane modaligaṁ narādhipaṁ viśvanāthaykanenippaṁ bhuktimuktipradama
nosedu mārppīṣaneṁdoḍadēṁ dhanyano daṁḍādhīśacūḍāmaṇi sa
kaḻaguṇagaṇāḻaṁkṛtaṁ sōvidēva . svasti śrīmatu kasapayyanāyaka
ruṁ śrīmanu mahāmaṁḍaḻēsvaraṁ Eḻamēla siṁgidēvarasaruṁ
mahāpradhānaṁ daṁḍanāyakaṁ kumāraṁ ba(ṁ)mmidēvarasaruṁ kumma
siya mahāprabhugaḻu śrīkaraṇada cākaṇayyanāyakaruṁ guṁ
ḍarasaruṁ Avara ta(ṁ)mma mahadēvarasaruṁ kaḍalevāḍada catussīme
mūḍalā dēvavaḷḷi seṁbevāḍada paḍuvaṇa sīmeyādiyāgi teṁka
lu ku(ṁ)mmasiya prabhu mānyada baḍagaṇa sīme paḍuvalu nā
vidigeya dēvaṇagāveya Aḍḍadāriya mūḍalu dēvaṇa
gāveya sīme baḍagalu koḷaṁbiya teṁkaṇa sīmeya hiṭṭa
nōtu mēre A(ṁ)ntu kaḍalevāḍada catussīmāghāṭa jalapāśāṇasahita
māgi kaḍalevāḍada prabhutva Aṣṭabhōga tējasāmya gāṇāyile haḍiya
de tippesuṁka manedeṟe pāri�ya holegoṟe maṟava Īṁtinituvaṁ sarvvanama
śyavāgi sakavarśada 1097 neya manmathasaṁvatsarada puśya bahuḻa Amavā
se maṁgaḻavāra Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁti vyatīpāta nimittavāgi śrī
svayaṁbhu sōmanāthadēvara Aṁgaraṁgabhōgakkaṁ dhūpadīpanaivēdyakkaṁ khaṁḍa
sphuṭitajīrnnōddhārakkaṁ Ācāryya sōvarāsipaṁḍitadēvargge kālaṁ karcci dhārā pū
rvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁ
dharā ṣaṣṭirvvarśasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmi . maṁgaḻa mahā śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 20.158 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
